title: Highway Star NoLimits Coaster
description:
This is my third No Limits roller coaster I have created. As you can probably see, I am still getting used to the program, so some parts may be rough. This coaster is a hyper coaster, so there are no inversions due to the restrictions of a lap bar. The coaster is relatively small and short as opposed to the other hyper coasters that are out there, such as Steel Dragon 2000, which is more than 300 feet tall and is the longest coaster in the world. Because these coasters are generally time-consuming (this took 2 days) as opposed to RCT3, I will be reeling out more Tycoon creations in the future.

Song credits - Highway Star by Deep Purple
